final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for the brand "RAN QIU", combining Eastern aesthetics and natural autumnal poetry.

Style/medium: flat minimalist editorial photography meets ink-wash illustration, inspired by Japanese wabi-sabi and Chinese literati painting restraint, warm and healing
Composition: portrait format with generous negative space, centered brand mark in lower third, shallow depth of field blurring natural elements into soft bokeh, breathing room above and below subject
Subject: brand wordmark "RAN QIU" as the visual anchor, surrounded by sparse natural elements — dried reed plumes, a single persimmon branch with fruit, or fallen ginkgo leaves — evoking deep-autumn stillness
Scene/backdrop: minimal abstract background in #E8DCCB (warm beige), soft gradient suggesting late-afternoon haze, no busy environment
Lighting/mood: golden-hour side lighting, warm low sun raking across surfaces, soft diffused glow, mood is quiet, poetic, and gently melancholic — the feeling of a still autumn afternoon
Color palette: #8B3A1E deep autumn brick-red as the dominant accent, #E8DCCB warm beige as the expansive ground, #D4A574 golden amber as the transitional mid-tone; colors relate as earth-to-sky warmth, never cold
Materials/textures: matte paper grain on background, delicate translucent dried-leaf veins, subtle linen weave texture on negative space areas
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: brand mark must be legible at poster scale; color palette strictly limited to the three brand colors plus near-white; negative space must occupy at least 50% of the frame; no photorealistic clutter
Avoid: busy backgrounds, neon or cool-toned light, over-saturated colors, Western floral arrangements, generic Behance flat-design look, drop shadows, gradients outside the brand palette
